html:
Exclusive to:

Sanctum Puzzle Rocks is a strucutre in wich player can stend and jump to other sanctum rocks or jump to serface.

In Sequitor's Puzzle, they appear after Lever was activated. They will collapse a few seconds after being stepped on, or immediately once the character standing on them moves away.

In Flummoxing Flame Puzzle, they appear after solving the puzzle.

Gallery

  • Sanctum Puzzle ingame.
  • Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.
  • On Sanctum Concept Art from Rhymes with Play stream.

title: Sanctum Rocks
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Object Infobox
|biome = [[Sanctum]]
|image = <gallery>
Sanctum Puzzle Rocks.png|1
Sanctum Puzzle Rocks 2.png|2
</gallery>
}}
'''Sanctum Puzzle Rocks''' is a strucutre in wich player can stend and jump to other sanctum rocks or jump to serface.

In [[Sequitor's Puzzle]], they appear after [[Lever]] was activated. They will collapse a few seconds after being stepped on, or immediately once the character standing on them moves away.

In [[Flummoxing Flame Puzzle]], they appear after solving the puzzle.
